title: Create Cogs and Crops
description: A mod centred around the Create Mod and Farmer's Delight. It also has other mods.
body:
This Modpack is meant to add to Technology and Farming aspects of Minecraft. This is done by adding the Create Mod and Farmer's Delight and some add-ons. It adds a lot to the game as it also adds Structures, Decoration Mods, Mob Mods and More. 

This modpack is based around Adventure, Exploration, Food and Technology. The Main Parts of the Modpack are: -Create Addons -Tech mods -Farming Mods -Building Mods -Structure Mods -Client-Side Mods -Performance Mods -Combat Mods and other Miscellanious Mods

You should download this modpack if you want a Modpack focused on the Create Mod but still having other mods that improve the overall Minecraft Experience. Further Updates to the Modpack will add new mods or take away old ones so make sure to check the changes and choose which version of the modpack to use. The Main Mods are below:
-Create and Add-ons
-Ad Astra
-Farmer's Delight
-Blossom
-Chipped
-Clutter
-Terralith, Tectonic, Deeper Oceans, NullScapes and Continents
-Yung Series and Other Structure Mods

Also check out my other Modpack!
https://modrinth.com/modpack/mr-whippy-modpack
